⚡ CRYPTO SCALP SCANNER — User Guide

Real-time Binance scanner for sub-$1 coins. Multi-indicator scoring, live trade tracking, and multi-channel alerts. No API key needed.

Python 3.10+ PyQt6 Binance Spot Public API Arch Linux · Windows · macOS No API Key Required

📋 Table of Contents

  1. Installation
  2. Tab 1 — Scanner
  3. Tab 2 — Top Picks
  4. Tab 3 — Config
  5. Tab 4 — Alerts
  6. Tab 5 — Trades
  7. How Scoring Works
  8. Full Workflow Example

1 — Installation

1
Install Python dependencies
pip install PyQt6 requests
On Arch Linux: pip install PyQt6 requests --break-system-packages
2
Run the app
python crypto_scanner_v9.py
3
(Optional) Install a monospace font for crisp text
Arch: sudo pacman -S ttf-jetbrains-mono  ·  Windows: Consolas is built-in  ·  macOS: Menlo is built-in
💡
No API key needed. The scanner uses Binance public REST endpoints only — no account or login required.

2 — Tab 1: Scanner

Main table view

The Scanner table is the engine room. After hitting ⚡ SCAN, every qualifying coin appears as a row with all its indicator values. Click any column header to sort. Double-click a row for the full detail popup. Right-click to enter a trade.

⚡ CRYPTO SCALPER logo
Binance Spot · Price <$1 · Vol >$1M · 5m — active filters
Done — coins analysed + timestamp
⚙ Cols — reset column widths
⚡ SCAN — run scan now
📊 Scanner tab (active)
① #
② Symbol
③ Price
④ 24h%
⑤ RSI
⑥ StRSI
⑦ MACD ▲▼
⑧ BB%
⑨ Vol 24h
⑩ Signal badge
⑪ Pot%
⑫ Exp%
⑬ L/S score
⑭ Pattern
⑮ Sparkline
⑯ Age/Conf/1H
Status bar — scan summary

Column Reference

①
Rank #
Position in current sort order.
②
Symbol
Trading pair name. Double-click any row to open the full detail popup for that coin.
③
Price
Current last price in USDT from Binance.
④
24h%
Price change over last 24 hours. Green = up, Red = down. Strong negative = potential LONG bounce. Strong positive = SHORT candidate.
⑤
RSI (14)
Relative Strength Index. <40 = oversold → LONG signal. >60 = overbought → SHORT signal. Shown as mini bar + number.
⑥
StRSI
Stochastic RSI — faster oscillator. <20 strongly oversold, >80 strongly overbought. More sensitive than regular RSI.
⑦
MACD ▲▼
▲ = MACD histogram positive (bullish momentum). ▼ = negative (bearish). Fresh crossovers score 3×, stale only 1×.
⑧
BB%
Bollinger Band position. 0% = price at lower band (LONG). 100% = at upper band (SHORT). Shown as coloured mini bar.
⑨
Vol 24h
24-hour volume in USDT. Must exceed Min Volume filter (default $1M) to appear in results.
⑩
Signal badge
STRONG BUY / BUY or STRONG SELL / SELL or NEUTRAL. Based on multi-indicator scoring — see Section 7.
⑪
Pot%
Profit Potential — composite quality score 0–100%. Green ≥70%, Yellow 40–69%. Sort by this to rank best opportunities.
⑫
Exp%
Expected price move based on ATR + volume. Higher = bigger expected swing. Used to filter low-volatility coins.
⑬
L/S score
e.g. L8/S2 = Long scored 8, Short scored 2. The higher side wins. Max theoretical ~13.
⑭
Pattern
Candlestick pattern detected: Hammer, Shooting Star, Bullish/Bearish Engulf, Vol Spike ↑↓, Doji, Squeeze, Uptrend, Downtrend, Neutral.
⑮
Sparkline chart
Mini price chart of the last 50 candles. Green line = price going up. Red line = down. Gives instant visual of recent momentum.
⑯
Age / Conf / 1H
Age: how long since signal appeared (green <30s, yellow <5m, red = stale). Conf: confirmation count. 1H: 1-hour trend arrow ↑↓→.

Right-click Context Menu

Right-click any row in the Scanner to enter a trade or open the coin on Binance.

How to enter a trade: Right-click the coin → select LONG or SHORT (the signal-matching side is highlighted with ★) → review the confirm dialog with pre-filled entry, SL, TP → confirm. The app switches to the Trades tab automatically.

Double-click: Full Detail Popup

Double-clicking any row opens a floating detail panel with a candlestick chart, full indicator values, support/resistance levels, and pre-calculated trade setup. Press Esc or click outside to close.

3 — Tab 2: Top Picks

Best candidates at a glance

Top Picks shows only BUY and SELL coins as rich cards — no NEUTRAL noise. Fully scrollable. Each card packs everything you need to make a decision without switching tabs.

🟢 LONG CANDIDATES section
🔴 SHORT CANDIDATES section
① Symbol name
② Signal badge
③ ⚡ Pot% score
④ Exp% move
⑤ 24h% change
⑥ Score bar (filled = winning side pts/10)
⑦ RSI bar
⑧ BB% bar
⑨ Conf ▮▮ + Age
⑩ Entry price pill
⑪ SL (red)
⑫ TP1 (green)
⑬ TP2
⑭ R/R ratio
⑮ Sup % distance
⑯ Res % distance
1H trend · Vol × · Pattern
⑰ MACD direction + value · StRSI

Card Row Breakdown

①–⑤
Row 1 — Header
Symbol · Signal badge · ⚡ Pot% (green ≥70%) · Expected move % · 24h% (right-aligned, colour-coded)
⑥–⑨
Row 2 — Quality bars
Score bar filled in accent colour. RSI bar: green if <40, red if >60. BB% bar: green near 0, red near 100. Conf shows how many scans confirmed the signal.
⑩–⑯
Row 3 — Trade setup pills
Entry · SL · TP1 · TP2 · R/R · Sup (distance to support as %) · Res (distance to resistance as %). Small Sup = price sitting on support = good for LONG.
⑰
Row 4 — MACD + extras
MACD ▲/▼ Positive/Negative with raw value · StRSI number · 1H timeframe trend · Volume ratio · Candlestick pattern name
Sup / Res explained:
Sup −1.0% = support is 1% below entry — price is sitting right on support, tight risk.
Res +18.7% = resistance is 18.7% above — well beyond TP1 and TP2, so there's room to run without being blocked.

4 — Tab 3: Config

Tune the scanner

All scan parameters, risk settings and UI preferences. Changes take effect when you click ✓ Apply Settings.

SCAN FILTERS section
RISK MANAGEMENT section
UI APPEARANCE section
ALERTS master toggle
EXPORT scan results to JSON
Max Price — only scan coins below this ($1.00 default)
Min Volume — filter illiquid coins ($1,000,000 default)
Interval — candle timeframe (5m optimal for scalping)
Top N — how many coins to analyse (30 default)
Candles to fetch — lookback window (50 default)
Stop Loss % — SL distance from entry (3% default)
Take Profit % — TP1 distance (5% default)
TP2 % — extended target for runners (10% default)
R/R Ratio — auto-calculated: TP ÷ SL = 1.67×
Font Size — resize all UI text (px spinbox)
🟡 Alerts ON/OFF toggle — click to enable/disable all alerts
Export last scan results to timestamped JSON file
✓ Apply Settings — save and activate all changes
💡
R/R is auto-calculated. Change SL% or TP% and the R/R label updates live. Aim for R/R ≥ 1.5 (default 1.67×). Never take trades below 1.0× R/R.

5 — Tab 4: Alerts

Automated monitoring

Enable auto-scan so the app monitors Binance in the background while you do other things. Configure which signal types trigger notifications and across which channels.

AUTO-SCAN TRIGGER section
Enable checkbox — turns on background scanning
Scan interval — how often to scan (30s shown)
Minimum signal — only alert on STRONG BUY or better
Min Potential % — ignore weak signals below this
Min Exp Move % — ignore low-volatility coins
NOTIFICATION CHANNELS
✓ Sound alert via ffplay (ascending = LONG, descending = SHORT)
✓ Desktop notification via notify-send
Telegram bot message (requires Bot Token + Chat ID)
WhatsApp via PicoClaw bridge (scan QR once)
✓ Apply Alert Settings
🔔 Test Alerts Now — fire a test across all enabled channels
ALERT HISTORY log — every alert with timestamp
Alert entry: time · symbol · signal · RSI/Exp/Pot · price
Auto-scan status: coins analysed + timestamp

Setting Up Telegram Alerts

1
Create a Telegram bot
Open Telegram → message @BotFather → send /newbot → copy the Bot Token.
2
Get your Chat ID
Message @userinfobot → it replies with your numeric Chat ID.
3
Enter credentials in Alerts tab
Paste Token + Chat ID into the Telegram fields → Apply → Test Alerts Now to verify.
Visual alerts always fire regardless of channel settings:

• Strong signal popup — floating panel with coin + full trade setup appears over the app
• Window flash — app flashes green (BUY) or red (SELL) to catch your eye
• Title bar flash — window title alternates signal + symbol for ~10 seconds
• Alert log entry — every alert is appended to the history log in this tab

6 — Tab 5: Trades

Trade journal + live P&L

Every trade you enter is tracked here with live unrealised P&L for open positions and cumulative stats + equity curve for closed ones. All trades persist across sessions in ~/.crypto_scanner_trades.json.

How to Enter a Trade

→

Select LONG or SHORT
→
✅

→

Trades Tab
App switches automatically

Auto SL/TP Hit Detection

⚡ Automatic close on SL/TP hit

After every scan (manual or auto), current prices are checked against all open trade SL/TP levels.

• Price crosses Stop Loss → auto-closed as LOSS. Critical desktop notification + SL sound fires.
• Price crosses Take Profit → auto-closed as WIN. TP notification + sound fires.

Just set your levels and let auto-scan run. You will be alerted.

Right-click Trade Actions

Right-click any row in the Trades table for:

• Close at current price — records exit at live market price
• Edit entry / SL / TP — adjust levels post-entry (e.g. move SL to breakeven after TP1 hit)
• Open on Binance — jump to Binance trading page for this symbol
• Delete — remove the trade record entirely

7 — How Scoring Works

The signal engine

Every coin gets scored independently for LONG and SHORT. The higher-scoring side wins and determines the signal — provided it clears a minimum margin. No black box, no ML — pure deterministic rules you can read in the source.

IndicatorLONG pointsSHORT pointsMax
RSI <25→+5 · <30→+4 · <35→+3 · <40→+2 · <45→+1 >75→+5 · >70→+4 · >65→+3 · >60→+2 · >55→+1 ±5
Stoch RSI <20→+2 · <40→+1 >80→+2 · >60→+1 ±2
MACD Positive + rising→+3 · Positive stale→+1 Negative + falling→+3 · Negative stale→+1 ±3
Bollinger Band pos<10%→+3 · <25%→+2 · <40%→+1 pos>90%→+3 · >75%→+2 · >60%→+1 ±3
Pattern Bullish pattern→+2 · Bearish pattern→−1 penalty Bearish pattern→+2 · Bullish pattern→−1 penalty ±2
24h Momentum 24h<−10%→+1 (bounce candidate) 24h>15%→+2 · >8%→+1 ±2
Signal thresholds (margin check required):

STRONG BUY — Long score ≥ 6 AND margin over Short ≥ 3
BUY — Long score ≥ 3 AND margin ≥ 2
STRONG SELL — Short score ≥ 6 AND margin over Long ≥ 3
SELL — Short score ≥ 3 AND margin ≥ 2
NEUTRAL — Neither side clears the threshold. Skip this coin.
💡
MACD freshness is the key v3 improvement. A freshly rising MACD scores +3 — 3× more than a stale positive one. This eliminates the common problem of signals that look good but are based on old momentum.

8 — Full Workflow Example

End-to-end scalp trade
1
First time: Configure your filters (Config tab)
Set Max Price ($1), Min Volume ($1M), SL% (3), TP% (5). Hit Apply Settings. These persist across restarts.
2
Enable auto-scan (Alerts tab)
Check "Enable auto-scan alerts", set interval (30s–120s), set Minimum signal to STRONG BUY. Apply Alert Settings. Now it runs in the background.
3
Hit ⚡ SCAN for an immediate scan
Watch the status bar fill with progress. Takes ~10–30 seconds. Results populate the Scanner table sorted by Pot% descending by default.
4
Review Top Picks tab
Look for: Score bar ≥7/10 · Fresh Age (green) · RSI deeply extreme · BB% near 0 (long) or 100 (short) · Sup distance small · Res distance bigger than your TP%.
5
Right-click the coin in Scanner → LONG/SHORT
Review the confirm dialog. The entry price, SL, TP1, TP2 are pre-filled. Set your USDT quantity. Check the live cost/risk hint. Confirm.
6
Monitor in Trades tab
The app auto-closes your trade when SL or TP is hit on the next scan. You get a notification. Or manually close anytime via right-click → Close at current price.
7
Review your stats
After several trades, check Win Rate and Profit Factor in the stats panel. Profit Factor >1.5 = healthy edge. Equity curve shows your cumulative P&L trend.
⚠️
Decision-support tool, not a trading bot. Trades are recorded manually by you. SL/TP hit detection is informational — execute actual trades on Binance yourself. Always manage your own risk.

9 — Keyboard & Mouse Shortcuts

Q Close app
Ctrl+Q Close app
Esc Close detail popup only (does NOT close app)
Double-click row Open full detail popup
Right-click row Context menu: LONG / SHORT / Binance / Details
Click column header Sort — click again to reverse
Drag column edge Resize column (locked after drag)
Mouse wheel Scroll Top Picks cards
Crypto Scalp Scanner v9  ·  Binance Spot Public API  ·  Settings: ~/.crypto_scanner_settings.ini  ·  Trades: ~/.crypto_scanner_trades.json
